title: Secretary Spec — Simple Ratio Lattice (stub tonight, full tomorrow)
status: drafted — stub tonight, ratios declared tomorrow

tonight: Create _ledger/ratio_lattice.json as empty array with scaffold notes
Wire loader into ai_instructions.js so the lattice block is readable even when empty

why_stub_now: Grid generator is being designed to read bedrock + TCL + north_star + ratio_lattice. If lattice isn't wired in from the start, adding it later means touching the generator twice. Stub now, populate tomorrow, generator stays stable.

upstream: north_star.json anchors declared (ratios reference anchor ids)
soft: TCL — full version will read outcomes to tune/learn weights, stub doesn't need it

open_questions: ratio format: string '3:1' vs. numeric 3.0 vs. both?
context field: free-text vs. tagged enum (conflict, scarcity, interruption, etc.)?
Symmetry: is {a:X, b:Y, 3:1} distinct from {a:Y, b:X, 1:3}? Loader normalizes or stores both?
Weight semantics: global confidence vs. regime-contingent?
Threshold for flipping from stub to full Pincer Engine — count-based or Jake declares?
